Natural cinematic realism with bright tactile editorial energy, SCARLETT wearing casual light-colored top with high-waisted linen shorts and bright coral lipstick, captured mid-motion glancing back over her shoulder with a gentle smile while standing in the shallows, next wave sliding in around her calves with white foam swirling across wet sand, serene beach shoreline at morning with sparkling ocean blues, scattered broken coral shells, and soft receding tide visible in the background, bright natural daylight casting clean directional highlights and sparkling reflections across the water surface, shot with dynamic handheld eye-level framing and shallow depth of field that keeps the moving figure sharp against softly blurred waves and distant shoreline, high-key airy color palette with true-to-life tones and subtle warmth

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: Scarlett - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: EXT. BEACH SHORELINE - MORNING - Sandy beach shoreline where waves meet wet sand
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity.
